compositional_truth_check.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: No evidence of mint foliage; pot appears empty or dormant.
compositional_truth_check.P3_Pothos: Present: Single leaf visible with white rabbit anchor.
compositional_truth_check.P4_Silver_Guest: Present: Single stem/sprout visible in the black pot shared with P2/P3 area.
compositional_truth_check.New_Interventions: Presence of crushed eggshells in P4/P3 pot area; electronic component (IC/chip) introduced on desk surface.

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current biological state. P1 and P2 are effectively empty. P3 and P4 are the only active biological units.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: One leaf remaining, stable but isolated.
plant_audit.P4: One thin, pale stem/sprout showing minimal growth.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, potentially high organic content due to eggshell presence.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: The electronic component (IC) moved from the right side of the pot to the desk surface. The sprout in P4 has remained largely static in posture.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Minimal change; the sprout in P4 shows no significant elongation or leaf development.

visual_health_inference.P3: Stagnant. The single leaf is the only remnant of the Pothos.
visual_health_inference.P4: Fragile. The sprout is etiolated, likely due to the lack of direct light, relying solely on the cool-spectrum LED.
visual_health_inference.P1_P2: Dead/Lost. No viable plant tissue detected.

anomalies: Crushed eggshells used as soil amendment/top dressing.
Electronic component (IC) placed on the desk surface.
Receipt paper present in the workspace.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of severe decline. P1 and P2 have suffered total systemic loss. P3 and P4 are surviving as remnants. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation, but the lack of light is causing significant stress, evidenced by the thin, pale nature of the P4 sprout. The desk environment is cluttered with non-botanical artifacts.
